reason: The image depicts a group of people excavating near the sea. While the setting is plausible for the discovery of the Lava Treasure in Corsica, several modern elements are present. The clothing of the individuals (hoodies, jeans), the presence of a modern DSLR camera with a lens, and the style of the shovels are anachronistic for a scene set in 1985. The modern appearance of the digital photography, of course, confirms that it isn't an actual photograph from 1985. The clothing looks too 'new' for the time period. Therefore, the image is not historically accurate.
